definitions.r_cub: minimum generic rank(JH) over noninjective maps F=X+H with H cubic homogeneous and det JF=1
definitions.nu_cub: minimum polynomial-matrix nilpotency index nu with (JH)^nu=0 over the same full cubic-homogeneous class
definitions.rho_HN4: minimum generic Hessian rank among homogeneous quartic Hessian-nilpotent Vanishing counterexamples
definitions.n_HN4: minimum ambient dimension among homogeneous quartic Hessian-nilpotent Vanishing counterexamples

r_cub.lower_bound_reason: de Bondt--Sun prove every cubic-homogeneous Keller map with rank(JH)<=2 is invertible
r_cub.upper_bound_reason: the certified 24-variable circuit-level collision has exact generic rank(JH)=17

nu_cub.lower_bound_reason: index at most two gives a quasi-translation and hence an inverse; no full-class index-three theorem is recorded
nu_cub.upper_bound_reason: the certified 22-variable circuit-level collision has exact polynomial nilpotency index 18

rho_HN4.lower_bound_reason: rank at most two reduces to the invertible cubic-homogeneous gradient case
rho_HN4.upper_bound_reason: the certified 44-variable HN quartic has exact generic Hessian rank 37

n_HN4.lower_bound_reason: the homogeneous symmetric nilpotent-Jacobian case is known through dimension five
n_HN4.upper_bound_reason: the certified homogeneous HN quartic counterexample uses 42 variables

smallest_ambient_cubic_witness_and_HN_so.sampled_index_status: diagnostic lower bound on the polynomial index, not an exact polynomial-matrix nilpotency certificate

certified_index_upper_witness.direct_polynomial_power_certificate: (JH)^17 has six nonzero matrix entries while (JH)^18=0

certified_HN_rank_upper_witness.sampled_index_status: diagnostic specialization only; not an exact polynomial-matrix nilpotency certificate
certified_HN_rank_upper_witness.exact_hessian_certificate: 12 polynomial syzygy generators contain 7 generically independent kernel columns, while an exact rational specialization has rank 37

class_scope_warning.full_cubic_index_three: invertibility is open in this ledger; the uniform degree-9 bound is false by van den Essen's dimension-5 example
class_scope_warning.power_linear_index_three: invertible by the cited power-linear results, a strictly narrower class than arbitrary cubic-homogeneous H
class_scope_warning.symmetric_jacobian_index_three: invertible by Wright's homogeneous symmetric theorem, also strictly narrower than the arbitrary tensor class

rank_index_coupling.consequence: invertibility through index d implies nu_cub>=d+1 and r_cub>=d

index_three_inverse_degree.exact_result: van den Essen's dimension-5 generic-rank-3 cubic map has weak index 3 and inverse degree 13

index_three_degree_11_obstruction.status: realized nontrivially by van den Essen's exact tensor, so it is not killed by the full coefficient ideal

rank_three_index_three_normal_form_exclu.family: four-variable lambda plus two arbitrary binary-cubic normal form
rank_three_index_three_normal_form_exclu.result: index three forces lambda=0, rank at most 2, and an explicit inverse of degree at most 5; rank three forces index at least 4

cotangent_kernel_excess.identity: rank Hess(y.H)=2 rank(JH)+rank(K^t A K), columns(K)=ker(JH)
next_strict_targets: rank(JH)=17 and kernel excess at most 2

attack_reductions.cotangent_dimension: beating quartic dimension 42 by a cotangent lift requires a cubic source of dimension at most 20

search_policy.required_change: alter the polynomial BCW gate circuit before homogenization
search_policy.partial_score: rank and complete sampled power-rank tuple of J(F-id)
search_policy.terminal_score: post-homogenization/post-kernel cubic rank/index plus cotangent-Hessian rank and transformed-Hessian power ranks
search_policy.promotion_rule: freeze any modular improvement, replay its collision independently, and certify generic rank and polynomial powers over QQ

bounded_negative_records.scope: shared y*b gate across two target components
shared v*z gate across the second and third target components, under structural and mixed beams
eight nonzero coefficients of the no-new-gate lambda*a*q target shear continued from the frozen rank-37 prefix
bounded_negative_records.conclusion: all eight coefficient-family leaders reproduce the incumbent profile; lambda*q is removed exactly by affine normalization

bounded_negative_records.scope: exceptional -12*a*s neutral shear, whose coefficient cancels a step of the frozen cleanup
zero-excess xxs gate combined with the two known rank-reducing atoms, jointly and pairwise
bounded_negative_records.conclusion: the existing zero-excess and rank-reducing atoms are not naively composable

bounded_negative_records.scope: all nine circuit atoms, width 64, prebeam factor 4, and 24 cleanup depths
bounded_negative_records.conclusion: no modular profile beats a certified endpoint; the rank-37 qb+x2s route is rediscovered
